data.title: Apple negotiating possible investment in Intel raises concerns about its relationship with Washington and Big Tech influence.
data.description: Speculation surrounding a potential investment by Apple has sparked inquiries into the status of the chip giant. With strong connections to the U.S. government, questions arise about the implications of such a move.

data.title: Pending home sales in the US dropped by 1% from a year earlier, marking the first decline in nearly three months. Average mortgage rate is at 6.26%, the lowest in a year, down from roughly 6.9% at the start of summer. Fed's interest-rate cut expected.
data.description: In Seattle, data from Redfin, a real estate brokerage powered by Rocket, revealed a 1% decrease in pending U.S. home sales compared to the same period last year, marking the first decline in almost three months. The average weekly mortgage rate dropped to 6.26%, a significant decrease from the summer's 6.9%, hitting the lowest point in nearly a year. This shift was in anticipation of the Federal Reserve's initial interest rate reduction of the year. The decrease in mortgage rates has been steadily declining.

data.title: Costco Q4 earnings potential - EPS $5.81, revenue $86.06B. Stock dividend $1.30 per share annually.
data.description: Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ: COST) is set to announce its Q4 earnings after the market closes on Thursday, September 25th. Analysts predict earnings of $5.81 per share for this quarter, compared to $5.29 per share in the same period last year. COST is expecting revenue of $86.06 billion for the quarter, a significant increase from $79.7 billion a year ago. The company has exceeded revenue expectations in the last two quarters and in five of the past 10 quarters. Investors are monitoring Costco’s performance closely, with an annual dividend yield of 0.55%, equal to a semi-annual dividend of $1.30 per share ($5.20 annually). For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: BARK to host immersive "Farmer's Barket" experience for dogs in NYC on Sept 27, 2025, from 1-5 pm ET - celebrating BARK's evolution.
data.description: In New York City, BARK (NYSE: BARK) revealed plans to organize BARK Live, a complimentary event focused on providing a dog-centric experience named "Farmer's Barket" on September 27, 2025, between 1:00 pm - 5:00 pm ET. The occasion will feature various toys for dogs to explore, treats for them to sample, and numerous areas for them to sniff around. This event underscores BARK's transformation as a business that is presently "Co-Owned by Dogs" and serves as the official launch of this new venture.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures saw a modest fall as hot stocks like Astera Labs and Credo continued sliding.
data.description: On Wednesday, various indexes experienced slight decreases as big performers like Astera Labs and Credo Technology adjusted to the changing market conditions. Dow Jones futures also saw a decline, while popular stocks like Astera Labs and Credo continued their downward trend.

data.title: NextNav acquires additional Lower 900 MHz band licenses, enhancing spectrum position and operational leadership.
data.description: NextNav Inc., a company specializing in next-generation positioning technology, successfully completed the acquisition of M-LMS A-block licenses from Telesaurus Holdings GB LLC and Skybridge Spectrum Foundation. The deal, finalized on June 20, 2025, strengthens NextNav's spectrum portfolio and operational capabilities in the Lower 900 MHz band. This move solidifies the Company's position as a leader in providing 3D geolocation services. The transaction, which involved NASDAQ-listed NextNav, marks a significant development in the company's strategic growth.

data.title: Rep. Jefferson Shreve visits YPPI in Greenfield, IN, a facility manufacturing stainless steel propellers.
data.description: On September 23, Rep. Jefferson Shreve, a Republican from Indiana, paid a visit to Yamaha Precision Propellers Inc. (YPPI) located in Greenfield, Indiana. During his tour of the facility at its busiest production timeframe, Rep. Shreve observed employees crafting stainless steel propellers specifically designed for Yamaha outboard motors. The Greenfield plant stands out for its cutting-edge foundry capabilities, encompassing processes like molten metal casting, precision machining, and final finishing touches. Apart from checking out the operations, Rep. Shreve engaged with staff members, conversing about YPPI’s impact on the local economy and the current workforce demands.

data.title: Mitsubishi Electric Power Products, Inc. marks 40 years with 1,400+ employees, serving utilities and industries.
data.description: Mitsubishi Electric Power Products, Inc. (MEPPI), a U.S. subsidiary of Mitsubishi Electric Corporation, marks its 40th anniversary today in Warrendale, Pennsylvania. Established in 1985, MEPPI has expanded with the Greater Pittsburgh area, now employing over 1,400 individuals across the country and globally. The company caters to various sectors such as electric utilities, data centers, transit authorities, sports entities, and commercial industries operating at the nexus of energy and data.

data.title: Slowdown in Bitcoin ETFs as US spot flows cool, hinting weak institutional demand may drop $BTC to $90K in correction.
data.description: Following significant inflows into US spot Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs), a decrease in flows has been observed, indicating a potential decline in institutional demand for Bitcoin. This could potentially lead to a prolonged correction in the price of Bitcoin.
